# kenny.cx

Hi! I’m Kenny, and this is my little corner of the internet. kenny.cx is where I collect the things I make, break, and occasionally fix — from web projects and design experiments to photography and whatever else I’m tinkering with.

[![GitHub latest release](https://img.shields.io/github/package-json/v/stickerboy/stickerboy.github.io?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&labelColor=088199&label=Latest%20version&color=f8f9fa)](https://github.com/stickerboy/stickerboy.github.io/releases/latest) &nbsp; [![GitHub commit activity](https://img.shields.io/github/commit-activity/t/stickerboy/stickerboy.github.io?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&labelColor=088199&label=Commits&color=f8f9fa)](https://github.com/stickerboy/stickerboy.github.io/commits) &nbsp; [![GitHub last updated](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/stickerboy/stickerboy.github.io/main?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&labelColor=088199&label=Last%20updated&color=f8f9fa)](https://github.com/stickerboy/stickerboy.github.io/releases/) &nbsp; [![Visit convrtr website](https://img.shields.io/badge/visit%20website-20B2AA?style=for-the-badge&logo=data:image/png;base64,&color=f8f9fa)](https://www.kenny.cx)  

## About the project

This site is a mix of portfolio, playground, and digital scrapbook. I built it to be easy to update, accessible to everyone, and a true reflection of my interests (and sometimes obsessions). Here you’ll find:

- Web development and design projects I’m proud of
- My own photography, with a bit of technical flair (EXIF data included!)
- Creative experiments, side quests, and personal curiosities
- A focus on accessibility and responsive design, because the web should work for everyone

Everything here is organized with a data-driven approach, so adding new stuff is a breeze. If you’re curious, want to collaborate, or just want to say hi, you can find me at [kenny.cx](https://www.kenny.cx).

Thanks for stopping by!

— Kenny
